name: SuperMario ROM Analysis
description: Reverse engineering project for Old World 2MB ROM matching SuperMarioProj.1994-02-09 sources. The SuperMario project is dated 1994-02-09 and sources correspond to one of the later 2MB ROMs (Quadra 660AV/840AV or PowerBook 520/540/550c or PowerBook 190/190cs) before the New World transition.
